name: Campus Dorm
description: Reliable base close to class that supports recovery between rough weeks.

name: Campus Library
description: Focused and calm, but long concentration blocks can be draining.

name: Town Center
description: Convenient for work and errands, but noisy and expensive week to week.

name: Grocery Store
description: Practical, maintenance-focused routine with mild cost pressure.

name: Part-Time Job Zone
description: Shift-heavy area where fatigue accumulates quickly.
